user.title: ClimateSync – Step 1: Source Rooms
user.description: Select one or more climate entities (rooms) whose heating demand ClimateSync will track. Each room must expose a current temperature and a target temperature.

destination.title: ClimateSync – Step 2: Destination & Settings
destination.description: Select the thermostat that ClimateSync will control. The **idle temperature** is used when no room needs heating. The **rounding mode** determines how the setpoint is rounded before being sent.

data.idle_temperature: Idle temperature (°C) – used when no room needs heating

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source climate entity.
error.dest_is_source: The destination thermostat cannot also be a source room.

init.title: ClimateSync – Step 1: Source Rooms
init.description: Change which climate entities (rooms) ClimateSync tracks for heating demand.

destination.title: ClimateSync – Step 2: Destination & Settings
destination.description: Change the destination thermostat and adjust all settings. **Resync interval**: how often ClimateSync checks even without changes. **Min change threshold**: smallest setpoint change worth sending. **Min send interval**: minimum seconds between two service calls (rate limiter).

data.idle_temperature: Idle temperature (°C) – used when no room needs heating

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source climate entity.
error.dest_is_source: The destination thermostat cannot also be a source room.
